/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libbase_demo_cpp__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libbase_demo_cpp__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/base_demo_cpp__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/base_demo_cpp/msg/detail/base_status__description.c.o CMakeFiles/base_demo_cpp__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/base_demo_cpp/msg/detail/base_status__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/base_demo_cpp__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/base_demo_cpp/msg/detail/base_status__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
